chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S-297 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE. For hearing of main case. 22.07.2025 Mr. Pir Bux Balouch, Advocate alongwith applicant. Mr. Moula Bux Memon, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG for State. ********** Mr. Moula Bux Memon, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.9, same is taken on record. At the very outset, learned counsel for applicant under instructions does not wish to press instant Crl. Misc. Application. Other side have no objection. In view of above, instant Crl. Misc. application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Ihsan/PS.
